narrative:
Pettisville (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,284 registered voters, with 44.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.1 percentage points.
